goal: Review and upgrade frontend upload logic for cancellation, validation, cleanup, and status reporting.
assumptions: The active upload dialog controller is frontend/src/components/files/upload/useUploadDialogController.ts.
frontend/src/hooks/files/useFileUpload.ts is legacy or secondary because no current caller imports it.
The backend chunked upload abort endpoint is available.
risks: Browser File.type can be empty for common files.
UI-only removal can leave hidden network uploads running.
Cancelling a running queue item can hang the upload batch if the queue Promise never settles.
Chunked upload failures can leak server-side sessions.
URL upload can read a very large remote body into browser memory before local validation runs.
steps: Inspect upload UI, upload service, queue, validation, and tests.
Add AbortSignal propagation through hashing and upload services.
Wire remove and clear actions to abort queued and running uploads.
Add MIME fallback validation and dangerous extension blocking.
Add URL upload size preflight before response.blob() and filename fallback from Content-Disposition.
Ensure queued and running upload cancellation settles the queue Promise.
Add regression tests and permanent constraints.
Run tests, lint, typecheck, and build.
